query:
SELECT externalId, name, businessName, contactEmail, status
FROM customers 
WHERE name LIKE '%W%T Parcel%' OR name LIKE '%W&T%' OR name LIKE '%Freight%'
   OR name LIKE '%Expert Electrical%'
   OR name LIKE '%Helloworld%' OR name LIKE '%Catolin%'
   OR name LIKE '%Hervey Bay Garden%'
   OR name LIKE '%Rochedale Doctor%'
   OR name LIKE '%TerryWhite%' OR name LIKE '%Terry White%' OR name LIKE '%Chemmart%'
   OR name LIKE '%Locanda%'
   OR name LIKE '%Coastal Dental%'
   OR name LIKE '%Southside Specialist%' OR name LIKE '%Springfield%'
   OR name LIKE '%Medpods%' OR name LIKE '%Yeppoon%'
   OR name LIKE '%UMC North%'
   OR name LIKE '%Mother Duck Enoggera%'
ORDER BY name LIMIT 30;
